title: Is Chat AI Killing All Your SaaS Subscriptions? #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses whether conversational AI chatbots could consolidate functionality from multiple specialized SaaS applications into a single interface, questioning the future viability of fragmented software subscriptions.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof asks whether a single AI chatbot could absorb functionality now split across multiple specialized SaaS applications. The commentary frames conversational AI and shifting user interfaces as possible forces reshaping the SaaS landscape. The core takeaway is a question rather than a verdict: whether consolidation into one conversational tool threatens the subscription model built on separate apps.
